description.value:
This technique can only be used if the user is near a mass paper that would equal to 25 pages of paper. It creates a thin wall of paper that grants any creature hiding behind it one-half cover if it is Medium-sized, or three-fourths if it is Small or smaller. The cover bonus only lasts for a single attack or area of effect before it is destroyed, regardless whether damage was avoided or not.

Defensive Maneuver (1/day): Minimum DC 16. The user may perform this technique to aid himself or an ally to defend against an incoming attack; doing so provokes an attack of opportunity.

To defend against the attack, the user must make a Perform check (as per Kami Boei, mastery counts) opposed to the opponent's attack roll or technique's Save DC +10. Success creates the barrier normally. Failure by less than 10 allows the technique to be performed anyway, but at one-half again its normal cost.

The Defensive Maneuver must be declared before knowing the result of the attack. Failure by more than 10 means that the chakra spent trying to avoid the attack is wasted, and the technique fails. The Defensive Maneuver has a chakra cost of 4 and allows the user to defend against an attack or effect from an opponent with a Challenge Rating equal to his level or 1, whichever is lower.

Requires: 5 ranks Craft (Visual Arts)

Material Focus: 25 pages of paper.

Mastery: Every step of mastery in this technique increases the number of times per day it can be used by 1.

Every step of mastery increases the CR of attack he can defend by 5 or up to his level, whichever is lower.

The fifth step in mastery also allows the user to affect items bearing Chakra Symbols (such as an exploding tag or advanced seal).
